text:
Six PRs merged this week. Flux-2-dev finally learned how rectangles work (dimensions now automatically snap to supported sizes). We also normalized the `finish_reason` output to keep OpenAI compliance happy, without breaking Gemini tool calls in the process. A delicate balancing act.

Plus, the ecosystem keeps growing: Pollinations CLI, NovelCraft AI, and a new media editor just hit the showcase. Building is fun. Check them out in the repo.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #aiagents
